event: delivered by emergency cesarean delivery at 31 weeks of pregnancy
CPAP machine with 6 PEEP and 30% FiO2
trophic feeding with breast milk started
raised C-reactive protein level of 70 mg/L
antibiotics escalated to meropenem and vancomycin
tested negative for wide range of metabolic disorders
required 3 min of aggressive cardio-respiratory resuscitation
septic shock, multiorgan failure, DIC, acute renal damage, and capillary leak syndrome
remained severely sick, CRP level of 223.3 mg/L
final exome sequencing results (NOTCH2 mutation) received
